task_completion.description: Create a custom text field labeled 'Referral Code' in the Leads module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Leads module layout editor or field settings with a custom text field named 'Referral Code' (and ideally showing length 50).

task_completion.description: Create a custom text field labeled 'Referral Code' in the Contacts module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Contacts module layout editor or field settings with a custom text field named 'Referral Code' (and ideally showing length 50).

task_completion.description: Configure the Lead Conversion Data Mapping to map the 'Referral Code' field from Leads to Contacts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Lead Conversion Data Mapping settings page showing the 'Referral Code' field in the Leads column mapped to the 'Referral Code' field in the Contacts column.

task_completion.description: Create a Lead with the specified Last Name, Company, and Referral Code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Lead creation form or Lead details page showing Last Name 'OConnor', Company 'OConnor Industries', and Referral Code 'WINTER-2026'.

task_completion.description: Convert the created lead into a Contact and Organization to verify the mapping.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the lead conversion process being submitted, a success message for the conversion, or the resulting Contact details page for 'OConnor' displaying the mapped Referral Code 'WINTER-2026'.

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM web interface to configure fields and create records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CRM web UI (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than executing terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The lead creation and conversion occurred within the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The forms and detail views match the CRM's standard interface, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the field names or record details.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to manipulate the DOM text to show 'Referral Code' or 'WINTER-2026'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Field Label: 'Referral Code'. Expected Lead Last Name: 'OConnor'. Expected Company: 'OConnor Industries'. Expected Referral Code: 'WINTER-2026'.
